mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_member_account ( login_id, password, email, role, created_by ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{password}, #{email}, #{role}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT member_account_idx, member_account_uuid, login_id, password, email, role, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM tb_member_account WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT member_account_idx, member_account_uuid, login_id, password, email, role, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM tb_member_account WHERE member_account_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_member_account SET email = #{email}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE member_account_uuid = CAST(#{memberAccountUuid} AS UUID) AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_member_account SET deleted_at = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE member_account_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND deleted_at IS NULL
